expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 2 explicitly requires launching 8 Task agents in parallel (all in a single message), one per persona: Henk Bakker, Fatima El-Amrani, Sem de Jong, Noor Yilmaz, Annemarie de Vries, Mark Visser, Priya Ganpat, Jan-Willem van der Berg.

expectations.text: Each analyzes specs from their perspective
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md provides a per-agent sub-agent prompt template with '{PERSPECTIVE}' filled in per the agent assignment table. Each agent reads the same spec files but with a distinct Analysis Focus guiding what they look for.

The sub-agent output format mandates a 'Missing Features' section (a table listing feature, priority MUST/SHOULD/COULD, persona rationale, and spec section affected) — every agent returns this section.

SKILL.md Step 3 instructs: 'Write the synthesis to: {PROJECT}/openspec/feature-counsel-report.md' and provides the full markdown template with Executive Summary, Consensus Features, Per-Persona Highlights, Feature Categories, Recommended Actions, and Potential OpenSpec Changes.

notes: The skill fully specifies the 8-agent parallel launch, per-persona perspective focus, required output format, and synthesis step. All four expectations are explicitly and unambiguously covered by SKILL.md.
